container_selection.overview: The Jenkins agent pod has three containers: build-tools, oc-tools, and bob. Knowing which container to run each step in — and when to switch — is essential for stages that combine git, Maven, OpenShift, and Bob CLI work.

container.name: build-tools
container.description: Default container. Has Maven, JDK 17, git, and basic shell utilities.

use_for.case: Maven commands (mvn compile, mvn test, mvn package)
Git commands (git diff, git log, git status)
File operations (cat, ls, mv, rm, mkdir)

container.name: bob
container.description: Bob CLI sidecar. Has bob in PATH and reads .bob/custom_modes.yaml from the workspace.

use_for.case: Every askBob invocation (the helper wraps this for you)
Direct bob CLI calls (rare — prefer askBob)

not_available.item: git (use build-tools for git, then hand the result to Bob)

rule.title: Default container is build-tools — most steps run there without wrapping
rule.description: The Jenkinsfile sets defaultContainer 'build-tools'. Any sh step not wrapped in a container() block runs in build-tools. So git and mvn just work; you don't need to wrap them.

rule.title: Always use askBob for Bob CLI invocations
rule.description: The askBob helper enters container('bob') for you. Don't duplicate it.

rule.title: Wrap oc-tools steps explicitly
rule.description: oc-tools is not the default. Wrap any oc/kubectl step.

rule.title: Group related work to minimize switches
rule.description: Each container() switch is a small overhead. Group related steps.

pattern.name: git_then_bob
pattern.description: Compute a git artifact in build-tools, hand it to Bob

pattern.name: maven_then_bob
pattern.description: Run tests in build-tools, hand failure logs to Bob

issue.name: bob_not_found
issue.cause: Direct sh "bob ..." in the default (build-tools) container.
issue.fix: Use askBob, which wraps container('bob') for you.

issue.name: mvn_not_found_in_bob
issue.symptom: mvn: command not found inside container('bob') { ... }
issue.cause: Trying to run Maven inside the bob container.
issue.fix: Run mvn in the default container; only switch to bob for askBob calls.

issue.name: oc_not_found
issue.cause: Running oc commands without container('oc-tools') wrapping.

quick_reference.command: // build-tools (default): just write the sh step
// bob: use askBob (it wraps container('bob') internally)
